title: Angel Tech The Greg Age
body:
# Welcome to Angel Tech The Greg Age
In this modpack learn gregtech through the Quest book that's mostly writen by the gregtech Dev team. 

Exoplore the lost cities or start a cottagecore play with custom farms play your way what ever that may be

Have fun! This pack is ment for fun, but beware the dark for monster have much more capability then before. You may need to use everything you got to keep what you want.

Explore the world, fight off great foes and build up the lost technology.

(PLEASE NOTE THE QUEST WILL BE ADDED ONTO BUT WILL GUIDE YOU THROUGH GREGTECH)





Mods Modrinth asked for link

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)

Mods I think deserve a link (All of them but these ppl gave me permission personally)

[https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/deep-dark-regrowth](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/deep-dark-regrowth)

[https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dustrial-decor](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dustrial-decor)

[https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/we-got-runners](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/we-got-runners)

This guys has several mods in my modpack (Mainly the extra moon phases)

[https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/draconicarchery/projects](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/draconicarchery/projects)
